=== TurboQuant MI300X Kernel Benchmark ===
GPU: AMD Instinct MI300X VF | warpSize=64
n_vectors=65536  n_warmup=50  n_iters=50

Input:   33.6 MB (float32, 65536 vectors × 128 dim)
TQ3 out: 3.4 MB (9.8× compression)
TQ4 out: 4.5 MB (7.5× compression)

Kernel                             | n        | min_ms         | avg_ms         | BW_in (GB/s)       | BW_out (GB/s)
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  TQ3 quantize (compress)          | n= 65536 | min=3.155 ms | avg=3.193 ms | BW_in=10.6 GB/s | BW_out=1.1 GB/s
  TQ3 dequantize (decompress)      | n= 65536 | min=0.169 ms | avg=0.177 ms | BW_in=20.1 GB/s | BW_out=198.1 GB/s
  TQ4 quantize (compress)          | n= 65536 | min=3.160 ms | avg=3.206 ms | BW_in=10.6 GB/s | BW_out=1.4 GB/s
  TQ4 dequantize (decompress)      | n= 65536 | min=0.172 ms | avg=0.180 ms | BW_in=25.9 GB/s | BW_out=194.7 GB/s
  TQ3 fused dot (1 query)          | n= 65536 | min=0.037 ms | avg=0.038 ms | BW_in=93.1 GB/s | BW_out=7.2 GB/s

=== Theoretical MI300X limits ===
  Memory bandwidth: 5300 GB/s
  For TQ3 compress  (FP32 in = 33.6 MB): theoretical 5300 GB/s bounded = 0.006 ms min
  For TQ3 decompress (TQ3 in = 3.4 MB): theoretical 5300 GB/s bounded = 0.0006 ms min
